metadata.description: Honest mediation reporting, alternative causal models, confound-restricted mediation, and unexplained variance decomposition
metadata.mediation_explanation: Proportion mediated = indirect/total = 0.029/0.002 = 11.78. This is nonsensical because the total effect is near zero due to opposing indirect (+0.029) and direct (-0.026) paths (a classical suppression pattern). The mediation label 'full_mediation' is technically correct (indirect significant, direct not) but misleading: it describes opposing statistical paths rather than a clean causal mechanism.
